title: Incorrect column data type reported
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t(x VARCHAR(255), y INTEGER, z FLOAT);
SELECT datatype(x) FROM t WHERE x = x + 0;
INSERT INTO t VALUES(NULL, NULL, NULL);
SELECT datatype(y), datatype(z) FROM t WHERE y = 1 AND z = 1.0;
key_bug_features: select typeof(x) where x=x+0 returns integer
